html:
“Can be unwrapped to release items inside.”

-

A Bundle of Thanks is given by the Crabby Hermit to reward the player for completed tasks.

Bundle of Thanks contains 3 random Shell Bells (40%, 40%, 20%), except at level 2 where there aren't any. It also contains 1 Honey if the Flower task has been completed.

At level 2, 4, 5 and 7 the Bundle of Thanks also contains one random Lure out of the following: Rainy Day Lure, Snow Day Lure, Stupefying Lure and Heavy Weighted Lure, with a 25% chance each.

Shell Bell Bundle

Shell Bell Bundle can be obtained in exchange for 1 Empty Bottle in the Bottle Exchange Tab of the Crabby Hermit.

Shell Bell Bundle contains 8 random Shell Bells with a 40% chance for Soprano Shell Bell, a 40% chance for Alto Shell Bells and a 20% chance for Baritone Shell Bell.

"hermit_bundle"
“She shore shells out a lot of these.”
–Wilson
“Nice, free stuff!”
–Willow
“Mighty Wolfgang was happy to help frail old lady!”
–Wolfgang
“For once I'm rewarded for my efforts.”
–Wendy
“PAYMENT FOR SERVICES RENDERED”
–WX-78
“How very welcome!”
–Wickerbottom
“I think that old hardshell's going soft on us, eh Lucy?”
–Woodie
“How... quaint.”
–Maxwell
“Öur labör hath been rewarded!”
–Wigfrid
“It's always fun to unwrap a package!”
–Webber
“Not to complain, but I would have preferred a nice edible arrangement.”
–Warly
“Thank you!”
–Wormwood
“Aw, she didn't have to give me anything...”
–Winona
“A bundle of goodies for our good deeds!”
–Wortox
“Presents!”
–Wurt
“I think she's really warming up to us, Woby!”
–Walter
“Ooooh I wonder what fun knickknacks are inside!”
–Wanda
“Can be unwrapped to release items inside.”

"hermit_bundle_shells"
“She DOES sell sea shells!”
–Wilson
“Great, more shells I can't burn. Why did I buy these again?”
–Willow
“Wolfgang like the plink-plonk shells.”
–Wolfgang
“Abigail likes the shells.”
–Wendy
“WHAT COULD HAVE POSSESSED ME TO BUY THIS”
–WX-78
“How very welcome!”

“A shell full of shells, eh?”
–Woodie
“Nautical decor was never my style.”
–Maxwell
“A fresh böunty öf shells tö adörn öur battlements.”
–Wigfrid
“We have so many shells to play with!”
–Webber
“A shell stuffed with shells.”
–Warly
“Shells shell”
–Wormwood
“Not sure what came over me to buy these knicknacks.”
–Winona
“Oh swell, a bundle of shells.”
–Wortox
“Full of pretty shells!”
–Wurt
“More for the shell collection!”
–Walter
“A nice assortment of shells to add to my little collection.”
–Wanda

Shell Bell Bundle contains 8 random Shell Bells with a 40% chance for Soprano Shell Bell, a 40% chance for Alto Shell Bells and a 20% chance for Baritone Shell Bell.
